positive: Stylized vector illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) sitting gracefully among swirling cosmic nebula and luminous flora. The fox has an ethereal, multi-tailed design and glowing accents. The composition is symmetrical and highly detailed, featuring strong black outlines, deep jewel tones (sapphire, amethyst, emerald) contrasting with bright starlight blues and golds. Minimalist yet dense, perfect for a high-contrast, printable apparel design. Flat lay composition, maximalist detail, elegant silhouette, digital art, ink sketch style, highly intricate, symmetrical balance, clean print lines, tattoo flash style.
